name: wbti
description: 牛马人格测验（WBTI）— light workplace humor quiz (entertainment only)

scripts.test:e2e: npm run assert:app-version && node -e "const os=require('node:os'); const path=require('node:path'); const {spawnSync}=require('node:child_process'); const defaultPath=process.platform==='win32'?path.join(os.homedir(),'AppData','Local','ms-playwright'):process.platform==='darwin'?path.join(os.homedir(),'Library','Caches','ms-playwright'):path.join(os.homedir(),'.cache','ms-playwright'); const env={...process.env, PLAYWRIGHT_BROWSERS_PATH: process.env.PLAYWRIGHT_BROWSERS_PATH || defaultPath}; const cli=path.join(process.cwd(),'node_modules','@playwright','test','cli.js'); const r=spawnSync(process.execPath,[cli,'test'],{stdio:'inherit',env}); process.exit(r.status===null?1:r.status);"
